sentences.english: My biggest meal of the day is dinner.
I heard you should have a heavier breakfast and a lighter dinner, but time-wise, it's easier for me to eat a heavy dinner.
sentences.korean: 더 무거운 아침과 가벼운 저녁이 좋다고 들었지만 시간상 저녁을 많이 먹는 게 쉬워요.

sentences.english: Breakfast, I skip most every day.
I always oversleep, so I don't have time for breakfast.
sentences.korean: 항상 늦잠을 자서 아침 먹을 시간이 없거든요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?

sentences.english: I know that breakfast should be the biggest meal of the day, but that just never works out for me.
sentences.korean: 아침이 가장 큰 식사여야 한다는 건 알지만 나한테는 절대 안 돼요.

sentences.english: I try not to skip meals.
I always try to at least eat something, even if it's on the go.
sentences.korean: 이동 중이더라도 항상 최소한 뭔가는 먹으려 해요.

sentences.english: I tend to snack quite a lot.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
